issues.message: Missing second overload. Source has two overloads: createDuration(amount, unit?, options?) and createDuration(amount, options?) where options ({lang?: string}) can be passed as the second argument directly without a unit. Data only documents the first overload.
return_type is 'string' but actual type is the string literal 'UTC' (const UtcTimeZone = 'UTC'). The signature field correctly shows the literal type but return_type is imprecise.

Parameter type DateTimeOptionsWhenParsing is referenced in the signature but this type is not re-exported from the package index, so users cannot import it. Consider inlining the type in the signature or noting it is not importable.
Parameter type FormatInput (string | undefined) is referenced in the signature but not re-exported from the package. Users seeing the signature cannot import FormatInput directly.
Parameter type FormatInput (string | undefined) is referenced in the signature but not re-exported from the package. Users seeing the signature cannot import FormatInput directly.
